name: Uncle Wang‘s Happy Life
description: Step into the heart of rural China — where every day is a delicious adventure! Welcome to Uncle Wangs Happy Life, a cozy life-simulation game that takes you on an unforgettable journey through the vibrant countryside of modern China. Youll play as Wang — a warm-hearted, balding grandpa with his loyal pup by his side — as he builds, farms, cooks, and thrives in his bustling village homestead.
instructions: Use the left mouse button or tap the screen to interact with everything
